verses.latin_vulgate: Domine, quid multiplicati sunt qui tribulant me ?  Multi insurgunt adversum me ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְ֭הֹוָה מָה־רַבּ֣וּ צָרָ֑י רַ֝בִּ֗ים קָמִ֥ים עָלָֽי׃
verses.king_james: Lord, how are they increased that trouble me! many are they that rise up against me.

verses.latin_vulgate: multi dicunt animæ meæ :  Non est salus ipsi in Deo ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רַבִּים֮ אֹמְרִ֢ים לְנַ֫פְשִׁ֥י אֵ֤ין יְֽשׁוּעָ֓תָה לּ֬וֹ בֵאלֹהִ֬ים סֶֽלָה׃
verses.king_james: Many there be which say of my soul, There is no help for him in God. Selah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tu autem Domine, susceptor meus es,  gloria mea, et exaltans caput meum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַתָּ֣ה יְ֭הֹוָה מָגֵ֣ן בַּעֲדִ֑י כְּ֝בוֹדִ֗י וּמֵרִ֥ים רֹאשִֽׁי׃
verses.king_james: But thou, O Lord, art a shield for me; my glory, and the lifter up of mine head.

verses.latin_vulgate: Voce mea ad Dominum clamavi ;  et exaudivit me de monte sancto suo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ק֭וֹלִי אֶל־יְהֹוָ֣ה אֶקְרָ֑א וַיַּעֲנֵ֨נִי מֵהַ֖ר קׇדְשׁ֣וֹ סֶֽלָה׃
verses.king_james: I cried unto the Lord with my voice, and he heard me out of his holy hill. Selah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ego dormivi, et soporatus sum ;  et exsurrexi, quia Dominus suscepit me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲנִ֥י שָׁכַ֗בְתִּי וָאִ֫ישָׁ֥נָה הֱקִיצ֑וֹתִי כִּ֖י יְהֹוָ֣ה יִסְמְכֵֽנִי׃
verses.king_james: I laid me down and slept; I awaked; for the Lord sustained me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non timebo millia populi circumdantis me.  Exsurge, Domine ; salvum me fac, Deus meus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹֽא־אִ֭ירָא מֵרִבְב֥וֹת עָ֑ם אֲשֶׁ֥ר סָ֝בִ֗יב שָׁ֣תוּ עָלָֽי׃
verses.king_james: I will not be afraid of ten thousands of people, that have set themselves against me round about.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam tu percussisti omnes adversantes mihi sine causa ;  dentes peccatorum contrivisti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ק֘וּמָ֤ה יְהֹוָ֨ה ׀ הוֹשִׁ֘יעֵ֤נִי אֱלֹהַ֗י כִּֽי־הִכִּ֣יתָ אֶת־כׇּל־אֹיְבַ֣י לֶ֑חִי שִׁנֵּ֖י רְשָׁעִ֣ים שִׁבַּֽרְתָּ׃
verses.king_james: Arise, O Lord; save me, O my God: for thou hast smitten all mine enemies upon the cheek bone; thou hast broken the teeth of the ungodly.

verses.latin_vulgate: Domini est salus ;  et super populum tuum benedictio tua.
verses.king_james: Salvation belongeth unto the Lord: thy blessing is upon thy people. Selah.
